title: Smoky Ukrainian Chinese Long Beans Stir-Fry
description: A grassy and snappy stir-fry featuring Chinese long beans, traditionally served in a dolsot stone bowl, said to cure hangovers. This gluten-free friendly recipe is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a dolsot stone bowl over high heat.
Add pork belly and cook for 2 minutes, until browned.
Add sliced ginger and minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add Chinese long beans and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender but still crisp.
Season with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Let the stone bowl retain some smokiness for the best flavor.
Adjust seasoning to taste, if necessary.
Finish with a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
Serve hot, straight from the stone bowl.
For an extra smoky flavor, reheat in the oven at 400°F for 5 minutes before serving.
